CustomField.description: POST 20240314 - This will signify that at least one of the documents has been synced to the EHR. PRE 20240314 - The unique id for the consent form document sent to the EHR System POST 20241014 - This field now will hold an Array of Id's that were synced. This will be used for the MWP.
CustomField.label: EHR Documents Ids
